options.a: Predicted positions of GNSS satellites to ensure that the required Geometric Dilution Of Precision (GDOP) will be available at all times.
options.b: Accuracy of the computed aircraft position based on input from at least one ground-based radio transmitter.
options.c: Aircraft's position in three dimensions from at least 4 available satellites and one on-board inertial system.
options.d: Integrity of the GNSS navigation signals using only GPS signals or GPS signals augmented with altitude.
